title: eleusine glaucophylla
intro: Eleusine glaucophylla, also known as Eleusine, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in various parts of the world for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Eleusine glaucophylla include the potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to act as an antimicrobial agent. Eleusine glaucophylla can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
